meaning: adj.水分多的,多水的,浅的,乏味的,脆弱的,稀薄的,无活力的
examples: If there's anything I can't stand it's an indecisive, wishy-washy customer.
This wishy-washy statement always made me felt uneasy.
You only build false hopes with wishy-washy responses.
Kerry used the situation in Iraq to answer a question about him appearing wishy-washy.
This view would be seen by both religious and atheist zealouts as wishy-washy and sitting on the fence.
